# formation-ip
Plate-forme de suivi des apprenants lors de leur parcours de formation 
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Plan de Formation — Ingénierie Pédagogique</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Bebas+Neue&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --bg: #0e0f14;
    --surface: #16181f;
    --surface2: #1e2029;
    --border: #2a2d3a;
    --border-glow: #3d4156;
    --text: #e8eaf0;
    --text-muted: #7c8099;
    --text-dim: #4a4e64;

```
--conception: #5c6ef5;
--conception-glow: rgba(92,110,245,0.18);
--digital: #2ec4b6;
--digital-glow: rgba(46,196,182,0.18);
--eval: #f7b731;
--eval-glow: rgba(247,183,49,0.18);
--facilitation: #ff6b6b;
--facilitation-glow: rgba(255,107,107,0.18);

--progress-bar: #5c6ef5;
--tick: #2ec4b6;
--radius: 10px;
--radius-sm: 6px;
```

}

- { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

body {
background: var(–bg);
color: var(–text);
font-family: ‘DM Sans’, sans-serif;
min-height: 100vh;
padding: 40px 24px 80px;
background-image:
radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 10% -10%, rgba(92,110,245,0.07) 0%, transparent 60%),
radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 40% at 90% 100%, rgba(46,196,182,0.05) 0%, transparent 50%);
}

.container { max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto; }

/* ── HEADER ── */
.header { margin-bottom: 40px; animation: fadeUp 0.6s ease both; }
.header-top { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; }
.header-text { flex: 1; }
.header-logo-wrap { flex-shrink: 0; }
.header-logo {
width: 110px; height: 110px;
border-radius: 50%;
border: 2px solid rgba(247,183,49,0.3);
box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(247,183,49,0.15), 0 0 8px rgba(247,183,49,0.1);
filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.5));
transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
}
.header-logo:hover {
transform: scale(1.06) rotate(3deg);
box-shadow: 0 0 36px rgba(247,183,49,0.3), 0 0 12px rgba(247,183,49,0.2);
}

.discord-badge {
display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
background: rgba(88,101,242,0.15);
border: 1px solid rgba(88,101,242,0.35);
color: #a5aef8;
font-family: ‘Space Mono’, monospace;
font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.12em;
padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: 20px;
margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.discord-badge::before {
content: ‘’;
width: 6px; height: 6px;
background: #5c6ef5;
border-radius: 50%;
box-shadow: 0 0 6px #5c6ef5;
animation: pulse 2s infinite;
}

h1 {
font-family: ‘Bebas Neue’, sans-serif;
font-size: clamp(32px, 5vw, 52px);
letter-spacing: 0.04em;
line-height: 1;
color: var(–text);
margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.subtitle {
color: var(–text-muted);
font-size: 14px;
font-weight: 300;
letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

/* ── STATS ── */
.stats {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
gap: 12px;
margin-bottom: 28px;
animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.1s ease both;
}

.stat-card {
background: var(–surface);
border: 1px solid var(–border);
border-radius: var(–radius);
padding: 18px 16px;
transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
}
.stat-card:hover { border-color: var(–border-glow); transform: translateY(-2px); }
.stat-label { font-size: 11px; color: var(–text-muted); letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.stat-value {
font-family: ‘Space Mono’, monospace;
font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700;
color: var(–text);
}

/* ── PROGRESS BAR ── */
.progress-wrap {
background: var(–surface);
border: 1px solid var(–border);
border-radius: var(–radius);
padding: 18px 20px;
margin-bottom: 32px;
animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.2s ease both;
}
.progress-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.progress-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(–text-muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; }
.progress-pct { font-family: ‘Space Mono’, monospace; font-size: 13px; color: var(–conception); }
.progress-track {
height: 6px; background: var(–surface2);
border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden;
}
.progress-fill {
height: 100%;
background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(–conception) 0%, var(–digital) 100%);
border-radius: 3px;
width: 12%;
transition: width 1s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(92,110,245,0.5);
}

/* ── LEGEND ── */
.legend {
display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 16px;
margin-bottom: 32px;
animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.25s ease both;
}
.legend-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; font-size: 12px; color: var(–text-muted); cursor: pointer; }
.legend-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }

/* ── PHASE ── */
.phase {
margin-bottom: 32px;
animation: fadeUp 0.6s ease both;
}
.phase:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
.phase:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
.phase:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.5s; }
.phase:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.6s; }

.phase-header {
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
margin-bottom: 14px;
}
.phase-title-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
.phase-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }
.phase-name {
font-family: ‘Bebas Neue’, sans-serif;
font-size: 20px; letter-spacing: 0.06em;
color: var(–text);
}
.phase-meta { font-size: 12px; color: var(–text-muted); font-family: ‘Space Mono’, monospace; }

/* ── SEMAINE CARD ── */
.week-card {
background: var(–surface);
border: 1px solid var(–border);
border-radius: var(–radius);
margin-bottom: 8px;
overflow: hidden;
transition: border-color 0.2s;
}
.week-card:hover { border-color: var(–border-glow); }
.week-card.expanded { border-color: var(–border-glow); }

.week-header {
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
padding: 16px 18px;
cursor: pointer;
gap: 12px;
}
.week-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.week-num {
font-family: ‘Space Mono’, monospace;
font-size: 11px; color: var(–text-dim);
white-space: nowrap;
flex-shrink: 0;
}
.week-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: var(–text); }
.week-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-shrink: 0; }

.tag {
font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px;
letter-spacing: 0.04em;
white-space: nowrap;
}
.tag-conception { background: var(–conception-glow); color: #8b97f9; border: 1px solid rgba(92,110,245,0.25); }
.tag-digital    { background: var(–digital-glow);    color: #50d8cc; border: 1px solid rgba(46,196,182,0.25); }
.tag-eval       { background: var(–eval-glow);       color: #f9cb6a; border: 1px solid rgba(247,183,49,0.25); }
.tag-facilitation { background: var(–facilitation-glow); color: #ff8f8f; border: 1px solid rgba(255,107,107,0.25); }

.week-hours {
font-family: ‘Space Mono’, monospace;
font-size: 12px; color: var(–text-muted);
white-space: nowrap;
}

.chevron {
width: 16px; height: 16px; color: var(–text-dim);
transition: transform 0.25s;
flex-shrink: 0;
}
.expanded .chevron { transform: rotate(180deg); }

/* Progress mini-ring */
.mini-ring-wrap { position: relative; width: 28px; height: 28px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.mini-ring-wrap svg { transform: rotate(-90deg); }
.mini-ring-bg { fill: none; stroke: var(–surface2); stroke-width: 3; }
.mini-ring-fill { fill: none; stroke-width: 3; stroke-linecap: round; transition: stroke-dashoffset 0.8s ease; }

/* ── TASKS ── */
.week-body { display: none; padding: 0 18px 16px; }
.week-body.open { display: block; }

.task {
display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px;
padding: 12px 14px;
background: var(–surface2);
border-radius: var(–radius-sm);
margin-bottom: 8px;
border: 1px solid transparent;
transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
cursor: pointer;
}
.task:hover { border-color: var(–border); }
.task.done { opacity: 0.65; }

.task-check {
width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 5px;
border: 2px solid var(–border-glow);
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px;
transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
}
.task.done .task-check {
background: var(–tick);
border-color: var(–tick);
}
.task-check svg { display: none; }
.task.done .task-check svg { display: block; }

.task-content { flex: 1; }
.task-title { font-size: 13px; color: var(–text); margin-bottom: 3px; line-height: 1.4; }
.task.done .task-title { text-decoration: line-through; color: var(–text-muted); }
.task-meta { font-size: 11px; color: var(–text-dim); display: flex; gap: 10px; }
.task-source { color: var(–text-dim); }
.task-duration { font-family: ‘Space Mono’, monospace; }

.task-link {
font-size: 11px; color: var(–conception);
text-decoration: none; margin-top: 4px; display: inline-block;
transition: color 0.2s;
}
.task-link:hover { color: #8b97f9; }

/* ── APPRENANT SELECTOR ── */
.apprenant-bar {
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
margin-bottom: 28px;
background: var(–surface);
border: 1px solid var(–border);
border-radius: var(–radius);
padding: 14px 18px;
animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.15s ease both;
flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.apprenant-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(–text-muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; flex-shrink: 0; }
.apprenant-list { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; flex: 1; }
.apprenant-btn {
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 20px;
border: 1px solid var(–border);
background: transparent;
color: var(–text-muted); font-size: 12px; font-family: ‘DM Sans’, sans-serif;
cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
}
.apprenant-btn:hover { border-color: var(–border-glow); color: var(–text); }
.apprenant-btn.active {
background: var(–conception-glow);
border-color: rgba(92,110,245,0.4);
color: #a5aef8;
}
.avatar {
width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: white;
}

/* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
@keyframes fadeUp {
from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(16px); }
to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}
@keyframes pulse {
0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
50% { opacity: 0.4; }
}

/* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
@media (max-width: 600px) {
.stats { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
.week-title { font-size: 13px; }
.apprenant-label { width: 100%; }
}
</style>

</head>
<body>
<div class="container">

  <!-- HEADER -->

  <div class="header">
    <div class="header-top">
      <div class="header-text">
        <div class="discord-badge">SERVEUR DISCORD · SUIVI PÉDAGOGIQUE</div>
        <h1>Plan de Formation<br>Ingénierie Pédagogique</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">12 semaines · 2h/semaine · Enseignement supérieur · Niveau débutant</p>
      </div>
      <div class="header-logo-wrap">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Logo L'échec est un diplôme" class="header-logo">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- APPRENANTS -->

  <div class="apprenant-bar">
    <span class="apprenant-label">Apprenant</span>
    <div class="apprenant-list" id="apprenantList"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- STATS -->

  <div class="stats">
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Durée</div><div class="stat-value" id="statDuree">12 sem.</div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Heures totales</div><div class="stat-value">24h</div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Modules</div><div class="stat-value">6</div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Avancement</div><div class="stat-value" id="statAvancement">0%</div></div>
  </div>

  <!-- PROGRESS -->

  <div class="progress-wrap">
    <div class="progress-header">
      <span class="progress-label">Progression globale</span>
      <span class="progress-pct" id="progressPct">0%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill" id="progressFill" style="width:0%"></div></div>
  </div>

  <!-- LEGEND -->

  <div class="legend">
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:var(--conception)"></div>Conception</div>
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:var(--digital)"></div>Digital learning</div>
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:var(--eval)"></div>Évaluation</div>
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:var(--facilitation)"></div>Facilitation</div>
  </div>

  <!-- PHASES & SEMAINES -->

  <div id="phasesContainer"></div>

</div>

<script>
// ─── DATA ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const apprenants = [
  { id: 'alice',   name: 'Alice M.',   color: '#5c6ef5' },
  { id: 'benoit',  name: 'Benoît R.',  color: '#2ec4b6' },
  { id: 'clara',   name: 'Clara T.',   color: '#f7b731' },
  { id: 'damien',  name: 'Damien K.',  color: '#ff6b6b' },
];

const phases = [
  {
    id: 'p1', name: 'Phase 1 — Fondations', dot: 'var(--conception)',
    meta: 'Sem. 1–4 · 8h',
    weeks: [
      {
        id: 'w1', num: 'Sem. 1', title: "Découverte du métier d'IP",
        tag: 'conception', hours: '2h',
        tasks: [
          { id: 't1', title: 'Lire : "Gérez un projet d\'ingénierie pédagogique" — partie 1 (ADDIE, analyse du besoin)', source: 'OpenClassrooms', duration: '~1h', link: 'https://openclassrooms.com' },
          { id: 't2', title: 'Explorer la plateforme FUN MOOC et s\'inscrire à FORMENSUP', source: 'fun-mooc.fr', duration: '~30min', link: 'https://www.fun-mooc.fr' },
          { id: 't3', title: 'Prendre des notes sur les 3 notions clés : objectif, compétence, évaluation', source: 'Réflexion personnelle', duration: '~30min' },
        ]
      },
      {
        id: 'w2', num: 'Sem. 2', title: 'Objectifs pédagogiques & ADDIE',
        tag: 'conception', hours: '2h',
        tasks: [
          { id: 't4', title: 'Rédiger 3 objectifs pédagogiques selon la taxonomie de Bloom', source: 'Exercice pratique', duration: '~45min' },
          { id: 't5', title: 'Analyser un plan de formation existant via la grille ADDIE', source: 'Ressource fournie', duration: '~45min' },
          { id: 't6', title: 'Partager ses objectifs dans le canal #exercices du Discord', source: 'Discord', duration: '~30min' },
        ]
      },
      {
        id: 'w3', num: 'Sem. 3', title: 'Scénarisation & conception d\'un module',
        tag: 'conception', hours: '2h',
        tasks: [
          { id: 't7', title: 'Créer un scénario pédagogique pour un module de 30 min', source: 'Exercice', duration: '~1h' },
          { id: 't8', title: 'Utiliser un template de storyboard fourni', source: 'Ressource PDF', duration: '~30min' },
          { id: 't9', title: 'Feedback pair-à-pair sur le canal Discord', source: 'Discord', duration: '~30min' },
        ]
      },
      {
        id: 'w4', num: 'Sem. 4', title: 'Consolidation & mise en pratique',
        tag: 'conception', hours: '2h',
        tasks: [
          { id: 't10', title: 'Livrable : mini-plan de formation complet (objectifs + scénario)', source: 'Rendu', duration: '~1h30' },
          { id: 't11', title: 'Auto-évaluation avec la grille de compétences IP', source: 'Outil fourni', duration: '~30min' },
        ]
      },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'p2', name: 'Phase 2 — Digital & Évaluation', dot: 'var(--digital)',
    meta: 'Sem. 5–8 · 8h',
    weeks: [
      {
        id: 'w5', num: 'Sem. 5', title: 'Introduction au e-learning',
        tag: 'digital', hours: '2h',
        tasks: [
          { id: 't12', title: 'Comparer 3 outils auteurs : Rise, Storyline, Genially', source: 'Comparatif fourni', duration: '~45min' },
          { id: 't13', title: 'Créer un micro-module de 5 slides sur Genially', source: 'Exercice', duration: '~1h', link: 'https://genially.com' },
          { id: 't14', title: 'Poster son module dans le canal #créations', source: 'Discord', duration: '~15min' },
        ]
      },
      {
        id: 'w6', num: 'Sem. 6', title: 'Évaluation des apprentissages',
        tag: 'eval', hours: '2h',
        tasks: [
          { id: 't15', title: 'Distinguer évaluation diagnostique, formative et sommative', source: 'Lecture guidée', duration: '~30min' },
          { id: 't16', title: 'Construire un quiz formatif avec H5P ou Wooclap', source: 'Outil en ligne', duration: '~45min' },
          { id: 't17', title: 'Analyser les résultats d\'un quiz fictif fourni', source: 'Exercice', duration: '~45min' },
        ]
      },
      {
        id: 'w7', num: 'Sem. 7', title: 'Facilitation & animation',
        tag: 'facilitation', hours: '2h',
        tasks: [
          { id: 't18', title: 'Lire les 5 postures du facilitateur pédagogique', source: 'Ressource', duration: '~30min' },
          { id: 't19', title: 'Concevoir un plan d\'animation pour une classe virtuelle de 45 min', source: 'Exercice', duration: '~1h' },
          { id: 't20', title: 'Simulation en groupe sur Discord (vocal)', source: 'Discord', duration: '~30min' },
        ]
      },
      {
        id: 'w8', num: 'Sem. 8', title: 'Projet mi-parcours',
        tag: 'digital', hours: '2h',
        tasks: [
          { id: 't21', title: 'Livrable : module e-learning complet (5 min, avec quiz intégré)', source: 'Rendu', duration: '~1h30' },
          { id: 't22', title: 'Présentation de 5 min dans le vocal Discord', source: 'Discord', duration: '~30min' },
        ]
      },
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 'p3', name: 'Phase 3 — Intégration & Expertise', dot: 'var(--eval)',
    meta: 'Sem. 9–12 · 8h',
    weeks: [
      {
        id: 'w9', num: 'Sem. 9', title: 'Alignement constructif',
        tag: 'conception', hours: '2h',
        tasks: [
          { id: 't23', title: 'Appliquer le modèle de Biggs à un cas réel', source: 'Étude de cas', duration: '~1h' },
          { id: 't24', title: 'Réviser ses objectifs du livrable mi-parcours avec l\'alignement constructif', source: 'Exercice', duration: '~1h' },
        ]
      },
      {
        id: 'w10', num: 'Sem. 10', title: 'Accessibilité & inclusion',
        tag: 'digital', hours: '2h',
        tasks: [
          { id: 't25', title: 'Découvrir les critères RGAA appliqués au e-learning', source: 'Ressource RGAA', duration: '~45min' },
          { id: 't26', title: 'Auditer son module mi-parcours selon 5 critères d\'accessibilité', source: 'Grille fournie', duration: '~45min' },
          { id: 't27', title: 'Proposer 2 améliorations et les intégrer', source: 'Exercice', duration: '~30min' },
        ]
      },
      {
        id: 'w11', num: 'Sem. 11', title: 'Mesure de l\'impact & évaluation Kirkpatrick',
        tag: 'eval', hours: '2h',
        tasks: [
          { id: 't28', title: 'Comprendre les 4 niveaux de Kirkpatrick', source: 'Lecture', duration: '~30min' },
          { id: 't29', title: 'Concevoir une grille d\'évaluation niveau 1 et 2 pour sa formation', source: 'Exercice', duration: '~1h' },
          { id: 't30', title: 'Partager et discuter les grilles en groupe Discord', source: 'Discord', duration: '~30min' },
        ]
      },
      {
        id: 'w12', num: 'Sem. 12', title: 'Livrable final & soutenance',
        tag: 'facilitation', hours: '2h',
        tasks: [
          { id: 't31', title: 'Livrable final : dossier d\'ingénierie pédagogique complet', source: 'Rendu', duration: '~1h' },
          { id: 't32', title: 'Présentation orale de 10 min + Q&A en vocal Discord', source: 'Discord', duration: '~30min' },
          { id: 't33', title: 'Compléter la fiche d\'auto-évaluation finale', source: 'Outil fourni', duration: '~30min' },
        ]
      },
    ]
  }
];

// ─── STATE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
let currentApprenant = 'alice';
// progress per apprenant: taskId → done
const progressData = {
  alice:  { t1: true, t2: true, t3: true, t4: true },
  benoit: { t1: true, t2: true },
  clara:  { t1: true, t2: true, t3: true, t4: true, t5: true, t6: true, t7: true },
  damien: {},
};

// ─── HELPERS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function getAllTasks() {
  return phases.flatMap(p => p.weeks.flatMap(w => w.tasks));
}
function getDoneTasks(apprenant) {
  const data = progressData[apprenant] || {};
  return getAllTasks().filter(t => data[t.id]).length;
}
function getTotalTasks() { return getAllTasks().length; }

function getPct(apprenant) {
  return Math.round(getDoneTasks(apprenant) / getTotalTasks() * 100);
}

function getWeekPct(week, apprenant) {
  const data = progressData[apprenant] || {};
  const done = week.tasks.filter(t => data[t.id]).length;
  return Math.round(done / week.tasks.length * 100);
}

// ─── RENDER ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderApprenants() {
  const list = document.getElementById('apprenantList');
  list.innerHTML = apprenants.map(a => `
    <button class="apprenant-btn ${a.id === currentApprenant ? 'active' : ''}"
            onclick="selectApprenant('${a.id}')">
      <div class="avatar" style="background:${a.color}">${a.name[0]}</div>
      ${a.name}
    </button>
  `).join('');
}

function renderStats() {
  const pct = getPct(currentApprenant);
  document.getElementById('statAvancement').textContent = pct + '%';
  document.getElementById('progressPct').textContent = pct + '%';
  const fill = document.getElementById('progressFill');
  setTimeout(() => { fill.style.width = pct + '%'; }, 50);
}

function tagClass(tag) {
  const map = { conception:'conception', digital:'digital', eval:'eval', facilitation:'facilitation' };
  return 'tag-' + (map[tag] || 'conception');
}
function tagLabel(tag) {
  const map = { conception:'Conception', digital:'Digital learning', eval:'Évaluation', facilitation:'Facilitation' };
  return map[tag] || tag;
}

function ringHTML(pct, color) {
  const r = 11, c = 14, circ = 2 * Math.PI * r;
  const offset = circ - (pct / 100) * circ;
  return `
    <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 28 28">
      <circle class="mini-ring-bg" cx="${c}" cy="${c}" r="${r}"/>
      <circle class="mini-ring-fill" cx="${c}" cy="${c}" r="${r}"
        stroke="${color}" stroke-dasharray="${circ}"
        stroke-dashoffset="${offset}"/>
    </svg>`;
}

function renderPhases() {
  const container = document.getElementById('phasesContainer');
  const data = progressData[currentApprenant] || {};

  container.innerHTML = phases.map((phase, pi) => `
    <div class="phase">
      <div class="phase-header">
        <div class="phase-title-wrap">
          <div class="phase-dot" style="background:${phase.dot}"></div>
          <span class="phase-name">${phase.name}</span>
        </div>
        <span class="phase-meta">${phase.meta}</span>
      </div>
      ${phase.weeks.map(week => {
        const pct = getWeekPct(week, currentApprenant);
        const color = week.tag === 'conception' ? '#5c6ef5'
                    : week.tag === 'digital'    ? '#2ec4b6'
                    : week.tag === 'eval'       ? '#f7b731'
                    : '#ff6b6b';
        return `
        <div class="week-card" id="card-${week.id}">
          <div class="week-header" onclick="toggleWeek('${week.id}')">
            <div class="week-left">
              <span class="week-num">${week.num}</span>
              <span class="week-title">${week.title}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="week-right">
              <span class="tag ${tagClass(week.tag)}">${tagLabel(week.tag)}</span>
              <span class="week-hours">${week.hours}</span>
              <div class="mini-ring-wrap">${ringHTML(pct, color)}</div>
              <svg class="chevron" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                <polyline points="4,6 8,10 12,6"/>
              </svg>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="week-body" id="body-${week.id}">
            ${week.tasks.map(task => `
              <div class="task ${data[task.id] ? 'done' : ''}" id="task-${task.id}"
                   onclick="toggleTask('${week.id}','${task.id}')">
                <div class="task-check">
                  <svg width="10" height="8" viewBox="0 0 10 8" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                    <polyline points="1,4 4,7 9,1"/>
                  </svg>
                </div>
                <div class="task-content">
                  <div class="task-title">${task.title}</div>
                  <div class="task-meta">
                    <span class="task-source">${task.source}</span>
                    <span class="task-duration">${task.duration}</span>
                  </div>
                  ${task.link ? `<a class="task-link" href="${task.link}" target="_blank" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">Accéder au cours →</a>` : ''}
                </div>
              </div>
            `).join('')}
          </div>
        </div>`;
      }).join('')}
    </div>
  `).join('');
}

// ─── INTERACTIONS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function selectApprenant(id) {
  currentApprenant = id;
  renderApprenants();
  renderStats();
  renderPhases();
}

function toggleWeek(weekId) {
  const card = document.getElementById('card-' + weekId);
  const body = document.getElementById('body-' + weekId);
  const isOpen = body.classList.contains('open');
  body.classList.toggle('open', !isOpen);
  card.classList.toggle('expanded', !isOpen);
}

function toggleTask(weekId, taskId) {
  if (!progressData[currentApprenant]) progressData[currentApprenant] = {};
  const cur = progressData[currentApprenant][taskId];
  progressData[currentApprenant][taskId] = !cur;
  renderStats();
  // Update only this task and ring
  const taskEl = document.getElementById('task-' + taskId);
  if (taskEl) taskEl.classList.toggle('done', !cur);
  // Update ring for the week
  const week = phases.flatMap(p => p.weeks).find(w => w.id === weekId);
  if (week) {
    const pct = getWeekPct(week, currentApprenant);
    const color = week.tag === 'conception' ? '#5c6ef5'
                : week.tag === 'digital'    ? '#2ec4b6'
                : week.tag === 'eval'       ? '#f7b731'
                : '#ff6b6b';
    const ring = document.querySelector(`#card-${weekId} .mini-ring-wrap`);
    if (ring) ring.innerHTML = ringHTML(pct, color);
  }
}

// ─── INIT ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
renderApprenants();
renderStats();
renderPhases();
// Open first week by default
setTimeout(() => toggleWeek('w1'), 100);
</script>

</body>
</html>
